productDisplayName: Baggit Women Fiancee Taj Black Belt
description: The belt is an essential style detail to complete your ensemble. This slim belt from baggit is made of textured synthetic leather for optimal durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this stylish belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies! Made of synthetic leather for durability and style Textured upper with stitch detail Tang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
